control_awareness: Aware that amount triggers department_head approval requirement (P2P-C-001) and pre-PO approval is required (P2P-C-003). Requester cannot approve own request (P2P-C-002).
expected_control_effect: System will route the request for department_head approval before purchase order issuance.
overall_reason: Choosing a single purchase request for the full amount is preferable because it meets approval control thresholds, aligns with requester objectives for clarity and standard process, and minimizes approval lead time given no quarter-end pressure and no aggregation control. Incremental requests are unnecessary here.
reason: The full amount exceeds the manager approval threshold and requires department_head approval. Creating a single purchase request is operationally reasonable and simpler given no aggregation controls apply.
